comment: Runtime level geometry. Level 1 is transcribed from the map job's data/mine-collision.json + mine-scene-hooks.json; levels 2-3 are authored variations on the same 120px row grid using the same platform/ladder art. Rows y: 128/248/368/488/608/728.

levels.name: The Shallow End
levels.introLine: Everyone starts somewhere. Usually on top.

levels.name: Deeper, Deeper
levels.introLine: That's it, Dusty. The good ore is further down.

levels.name: The Motherlode
levels.introLine: Uncle Randy always said: finish what you start.

levels.name: The Night Shift
levels.introLine: Some things only come out after dark.

levels.name: The Break Room
levels.introLine: The coffee is strong. The crabs are stronger.

levels.name: Union Rules
levels.introLine: Keep the line moving. The line insists.

levels.name: Hot Air
levels.introLine: It rises. So can you.

levels.name: Deferred Maintenance
levels.introLine: Someone filed a report. Someone filed it away.

levels.name: Getting the Point
levels.introLine: Health and safety sends their regards.

levels.name: Human Resources
levels.introLine: Immune to charm since 1962.

levels.name: The Graveyard Shift
levels.introLine: The bats work nights. So do you.

levels.name: Double Time
levels.introLine: The company loves overtime. Loves it.

levels.name: Slip 'n' Slide
levels.introLine: Twice the slides. Zero liability.

levels.name: The Squeeze
levels.introLine: Tight fits build character.

levels.name: Shaft Happens
levels.introLine: We warned you in the game-over screen.

levels.name: The Deep End
levels.introLine: Hold your breath. Kidding. Mostly.

levels.name: Overtime
levels.introLine: Time and a half. Mostly the half.

levels.name: The Foreman's Office
levels.introLine: He has a corner shaft and no sense of humor.

levels.name: Rock Bottom
levels.introLine: There is only one way to go from here. (It's up.)

levels.name: The Motherlode II: Mother Lode Harder
levels.introLine: Uncle Randy would be so proud. Probably.
